title: Pinterest Live Verification & Root Cause Audit
scope: Last 250 published Pinterest pins (newest first), live database snapshot
verdict: FAIL — 100% of recent published pins were emitted by the LEGACY publisher. PCIE2 has 0 pipeline traces. Global publishing stop flag is ENGAGED, so no new pins are flowing through any pipeline. Low traffic is attributable to (a) the global stop preventing distribution since 2026-06-25 16:40 UTC and (b) historical legacy content quality issues (dup titles, CJ-host images).

publisher_state.sole_publisher_function: pcie2-publisher (idle — gates fail-closed pending creative briefs)

visitor_analysis.diagnosis: Distribution starvation. No pins published since global stop engaged ~16h ago. Historical pin pool has 22% duplicate titles and 6% CJ-host images, suppressing Pinterest algorithmic distribution. Add-to-cart event chain previously diagnosed (incident 2026-06-25) is still being rolled out.
